title: Stanbic IBTC Insurance Launches Education Endowment Plan to Secure Children’s Academic Future - FinancialEDGE
description: Stanbic IBTC Insurance, a subsidiary of Stanbic IBTC Holdings, has introduced the Education Endowment Plan, a innovative solution designed to help parents and guardians invest in their children's educational future. html:
Stanbic IBTC Insurance, a subsidiary of Stanbic IBTC Holdings, has introduced the Education Endowment Plan, a innovative solution designed to help parents and guardians invest in their children’s educational future.

This plan ensures that children’s education is secure, even in the face of life’s uncertainties.

The Education Endowment Plan offers a comprehensive investment solution that provides a financial safety net for families, ensuring that their children’s education is protected and secured.

By investing in this plan, parents can guarantee access to quality education for their children, empowering them to reach their full potential.

Akinjide Orimolade, Chief Executive of Stanbic IBTC Insurance, emphasized the importance of investing in education and the impact it has on a nation and its people.

He highlighted the plan’s benefits, including financial support in the event of death, guaranteed education for dependents, and peace of mind for parents and guardians.

The plan features flexible premium payments, coverage against death from any source, and a guaranteed sum assured.

It also offers an annual reversionary bonus, currently guaranteed at 2% of the sum assured.

Stanbic IBTC Insurance has a strong reputation for excellent service delivery, with over two decades of experience.

The company urges parents and guardians to take charge of their children’s future by securing the Education Endowment Plan, empowering the next generation to achieve greatness and build a brighter future for Nigeria.
